message.content:
Build the main student tab screens and onboarding screens for the Axiom app. Write files at /home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/.

All screens must use:
```typescript
import { useThemeStore } from '@/stores/themeStore';
const { colors } = useThemeStore();
```

Color tokens available: background, surface, card, primary (#D4AF37 gold), primaryMuted, text, textSecondary, border, success, warning, error, inputBg.

## 1. src/app/(student)/(tabs)/home.tsx — Student Dashboard

A beautiful home screen with:
- SafeAreaView with scroll
- Greeting: "Hello, [name]" with current date below, textSecondary color
- "Today's Focus" card: surface background, shows 2-3 placeholder study topics with checkboxes
- ProgressRing (import from @/components/ui/ProgressRing — it takes: progress 0-1, size, strokeWidth) showing overall progress. Center it in a card.
  - Note: The ProgressRing component may not exist yet, so create a simple inline circular progress using react-native-svg if the import fails. Actually, just inline a simple percentage text for now — we'll hook up the real component later.
- Quick Action tiles in a 2x2 grid: "AI Chat", "My Notes", "Video Hub", "Flashcards" — each a TouchableOpacity card with an Ionicons icon and label, navigating to the right screen
- "Study Plan" section: list of this week's milestones (placeholder data for now)
- Use router.push() for navigation from tiles

Actually for ProgressRing, just do a simple View with text showing "65%" for now — keep it simple.

Import Ionicons from '@expo/vector-icons'.

Use placeholder data throughout — we'll connect to Supabase later.

## 2. src/app/(student)/(tabs)/chat.tsx — Conversation List

- Header: "Conversations" title in bold
- FAB button (floating action button) bottom-right: gold circle with "+" icon, creates new conversation
- List of past conversations (placeholder data: 3-4 items)
- Each item: card with title, last message preview, timestamp
- Tap → router.push('/(student)/chat/[id]')
- Empty state if no conversations: "Start your first conversation with Axiom AI"

## 3. src/app/(student)/(tabs)/notes.tsx — Notes List

- Header: "My Notes" with search bar below
- Toggle: grid view / list view (use state)
- Filter chips: "All", "Physics", "Chemistry", "Math", "Biology" — scrollable horizontal
- Notes as cards: title, subject badge, date, 2-line content preview
- Tap → router.push('/(student)/notes/[id]')
- FAB: "+" to create new note → router.push('/(student)/notes/create')
- Placeholder data: 4-5 sample notes

## 4. src/app/(student)/(tabs)/profile.tsx — Profile Screen

- User avatar (circle with initials, gold background)
- Name, email, exam target
- "Invite Code" section: show the student's 6-char code with copy button (for parent linking)
- Settings list:
  - Theme toggle (Dark/Light) with Switch component
  - "My Goals" → router.push('/(student)/goals')
  - "Flashcards" → router.push('/(student)/flashcards')
  - "Video Hub" → router.push('/(student)/videos')
  - "Developer Options" (expandable: API key input field)
- Sign Out button (red text)
- Use supabase.auth.signOut() and router.replace('/')

## 5. src/app/(student)/onboarding/syllabus.tsx — Syllabus Upload

- Title: "Upload Your Syllabus"
- Subtitle: "Help Axiom create a personalized study plan"
- Big upload area (dashed border, tap to pick file)
- Use expo-document-picker: DocumentPicker.getDocumentAsync({ type: ['application/pdf', 'text/plain', 'image/*'] })
- OR: TextInput area for pasting syllabus text
- "Continue" button at bottom → navigates to exam-select
- Store syllabus text in a local state/ref for now

```typescript
import * as DocumentPicker from 'expo-document-picker';
```

## 6. src/app/(student)/onboarding/exam-select.tsx — Exam Selection

- Title: "What are you preparing for?"
- Grid of exam cards:
  - JEE Main (icon: ⚡)
  - JEE Advanced (icon: 🔬)
  - NEET (icon: 🩺)
  - CBSE Board 12th (icon: 📖)
  - CBSE Board 10th (icon: 📝)
  - Custom (icon: ✏️)
- Selected card: gold border highlight
- Date picker below: "Tentative exam date" using a simple TextInput (placeholder: "DD/MM/YYYY") — avoid DateTimePicker dependency
- "Generate Study Plan" button → navigates to study-plan screen

## 7. src/app/(student)/onboarding/study-plan.tsx — Study Plan Display

- Title: "Your Study Plan"
- Loading state: "Axiom is creating your personalized plan..." with ActivityIndicator
- Display plan as a list of weeks:
  - "Week 1: Physics — Mechanics, Kinematics" etc
  - Each week card with subject tags
- For now use PLACEHOLDER data (hardcoded study plan), we'll connect to AI later
- "Looks Great!" button at bottom → marks onboarding complete, navigates to home
- On press: update Supabase students table (set exam_type), update authStore.setIsOnboarded(true), router.replace('/(student)/(tabs)/home')

## 8. src/app/(student)/onboarding/_layout.tsx — Onboarding Stack Layout

Simple Stack layout, no header:
```typescript
import { Stack } from 'expo-router';
export default function OnboardingLayout() {
  return <Stack screenOptions={{ headerShown: false }} />;
}
```

Create ALL files. Use StyleSheet.create for styles. Make them look polished with the AMOLED gold aesthetic. Use placeholder/mock data where needed.

content.text:
All 8 files have been created. Here is a summary:

**Onboarding screens** (`/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/onboarding/`):
- `_layout.tsx` — Simple Stack layout with no header
- `syllabus.tsx` — Upload area with dashed border (uses expo-document-picker) plus paste textarea, "Continue" button navigates to exam-select
- `exam-select.tsx` — 2-column grid of 6 exam cards with emoji icons, gold border on selection, date TextInput, "Generate Study Plan" button
- `study-plan.tsx` — 2-second loading state with ActivityIndicator, then displays 6-week placeholder plan with week badges and topic bullets, "Looks Great!" button calls `setIsOnboarded(true)` and navigates to home

**Tab screens** (`/home/claude/projects/axiom/src/app/(student)/(tabs)/`):
- `home.tsx` — Greeting with date, "Today's Focus" checklist card, 65% progress circle, 2x2 quick action grid (AI Chat, My Notes, Video Hub, Flashcards), weekly milestones list
- `chat.tsx` — "Conversations" header, FlatList of 4 placeholder conversations with title/preview/timestamp, gold FAB for new chat, empty state component
- `notes.tsx` — Search bar, grid/list toggle, horizontal filter chips (All/Physics/Chemistry/Math/Biology), masonry-style grid or list of 5 notes with color-coded subject badges, gold FAB for create
- `profile.tsx` — Avatar with initials, user info, invite code with copy button (uses expo-clipboard), settings list with theme toggle Switch, navigation items (Goals, Flashcards, Video Hub), expandable Developer Options with API key input, red Sign Out button using `supabase.auth.signOut()`

All screens use `useThemeStore()` for colors and `StyleSheet.create` for styling with the AMOLED gold aesthetic.
